# Loyalty Widget & Branding

## Classic widget vs Unified widget

Joy launched the **Unified widget** as a complete rebuild of the storefront loyalty UI.

| | Classic widget | Unified widget |
|---|---|---|
| **Who has it** | Merchants who installed Joy before the Unified launch | Merchants who installed Joy after the Unified widget launch |
| **Status badge** | "Classic is live" | "Unified widget — Live" |
| **Focus** | Points and rewards only | All-in-one: profile, orders, wishlist, recommendations, points, rewards, and more |
| **Design editor** | 4 horizontal tabs (Widget theme / Membership card / Display / Advanced) | Full sidebar editor with live storefront preview |
| **Customization** | Limited color/font options | Every color, font, spacing, border radius exposed as CSS properties — full brand control |
| **Performance** | Standard | Lazy-loaded, smaller bundle on first paint |
| **Data** | — | Same Joy data — programs, points, customers carry over untouched |

## How to check which widget you're on

**Joy Admin → On-site content → Widget** — look at the "Loyalty widget" card:
- Badge says **"Classic is live"** → you're on Classic
- Badge says **"Live"** on the Unified card → you're on Unified

## Switching from Classic to Unified

Merchants on Classic can switch at any time:
- **Joy Admin → On-site content → Widget → Switch to Unified** button (top right)
- All existing Joy data (points, programs, customers) carries over — nothing is lost
- Both versions never run simultaneously

## Free setup offer

When a merchant asks about the difference or expresses interest in switching, offer the free setup service:

> "We're offering a free setup service where our team styles your unified loyalty widget or loyalty page to match your store's branding, colors, layout — the whole thing. You won't need to lift a finger. We'll take care of it and send you the result to review. Do you want to give it a try?"

If merchant accepts → collect store URL and escalate to team with `<escalate_human>`.

## Classic widget — features still on Classic only

Milestone program UI, interactive website popup, Wallet pass / QR, Submit receipt program, branded reminder popup — these auto-fallback to Classic UI even on Unified stores.

---

## How to identify Widget v4

The easiest tell: go to **Joy Admin → On-site content → Widget → Setup**. 
- **V4**: opens a full **Widget design editor** with a left sidebar (Settings / Header / Body / Footer / Extensions / Advanced) and a live storefront preview on the right.
- **V3**: opens a page with 4 horizontal tabs (Widget theme / Membership card / Display / Advanced settings).

## Widget design editor — path

**Joy Admin → On-site content → Widget → Loyalty widget → Setup**

## Sidebar structure

### Settings
- **Design** — Preset Theme (Midnight, Forest, Ocean, Warm, Blush, Minimal, Dark, Slate) + Industry inspiration presets (Fashion, Beauty & Wellness, Food & Drink, Home & Garden, Sports & Fitness, Pets & Animals, Men's Grooming, Default), Primary color, Background color, Layout (Widget / Drawer), Position on desktop, Earn & Redeem layout (Tabs / Separate blocks), Text size, Border radius (None / Sharp / Soft / Rounded / Extra), Currency icon (None / Emoji / Image), Fonts (Heading + Body), Text theme colors, Buttons (color, text color, text case), Cards (heading/body text color, background, border)
- **Launcher** — Float button style (Icon only / Label only / Icon & label / Point balance), Point balance label, Label section color, Button size (S/M/L/XL), Border radius (Pill/Rounded/Square), Alignment (Bottom left / Bottom right)
- **Content & Translations** — inline editor to customize all widget text labels (Program name, Launcher, Guest view, Logged in, Points display, Tier perks, Program tabs, Section titles, Coupons, Referral, Redeem flow, Earn flow, bundle chip templates like `Save {{value}} · {{type}}`, etc.). Buttons: **Revert to default** (reset all text) and **On-brand** (AI-rewrite labels to match store voice).

### Header
- **Header** — Program name text size (Small/Medium/Large), Header background color (or "Use primary"), Header text color, Logo (Add image, or paste image URL, or "Use store logo" button — any aspect ratio, height configurable), Header background image (upload; recommended **8:5 ratio, 800×500px, under 200KB**) + overlay opacity slider

### Body
Each block can be **toggled on/off** and **drag-and-drop reordered**. Click any block to edit its content, text, or images inline.

| Block | Notes |
|---|---|
| Membership card | Card layout (Compact/Classic), Default avatar, Guest card image, Member card image, Sign-in settings, Open widget after login |
| My coupons | — |
| Refer a friend | — |
| Ways to earn | — |
| Ways to redeem | — |
| Recently viewed | Off by default |
| Recommended | Off by default |
| Recent activity | Off by default |
| Milestones | — |
| My QR code | — |
| Wallet pass | — |
| Subscription portal | Requires Joy Subscription extension |
| Wishlist | Off by default; requires Joy Wishlist app |

**Membership card custom blocks** — click the `+` under Membership card to add: Heading, Rich text, Button, Divider, Image banner, Image with text, Custom link, Custom CTA.

### Footer
- **Footer menu** — bottom navigation tabs. Drag to reorder, toggle visibility, customize each tab.
  - **Display mode**: Icons & labels / Icons only / Labels only
  - **Active indicator style**: Pill / (others)
  - Tabs: **Home, Rewards, Orders, Wishlist, Reviews, Profile** (each toggleable; Wishlist/Reviews hidden by default)
- **Profile** (the Profile tab's sub-pages, each toggleable): Account info, Referral link, Social accounts, Shipping addresses, Settings, Log out, Reviews.

### Extensions
Toggle on/off: **Wishlist**, **Bundling**, **Reviews**, **Subscription**, **Survey**. Each extension that needs a companion app (e.g. Wishlist) shows an "Install app / Watch setup guide / Verify installation" panel and a layout/options block (e.g. Wishlist layout: Carousel / Grid / List, image hover effect).

### Advanced
- **Display** — hide widget from guests, page restriction, instant popup, hide widget button
- **Popup** — popup behavior settings
- **Custom links** — redirect links for earning programs
- **Custom CSS** — custom CSS field for pixel-level overrides

## Live preview controls

The editor's right pane is a live storefront preview with an **"Embed active"** status badge. The "Preview as" toolbar lets the merchant simulate different viewers without affecting the live store:
- **Device** — Desktop / Mobile
- **Customer** — Signed in / Guest
- **VIP tier** — Member (no VIP) / Simulate VIP active
- **Customise customer data…** — set sample points/tier for the preview
- **View on store** — open the real storefront in a new tab

---

Basic features on all plans; **enhanced Display features** on Essential, Advanced, Ultimate.

## Brand colors

Joy auto-detects your store's primary, secondary, accent palette. Edit at **Joy Admin → Settings → Colors**. These appear in color pickers throughout Joy.

## Display types

- **Floating widget** — small chatbox-style button (default)
- **Drawer** — large side panel similar to cart drawer
- Mobile slides up from bottom for both

## Setup path

**Joy Admin → On-site content → Widget → Loyalty widget → Setup** — controls layout, color, position, advanced custom CSS.

## Safe preview

Duplicate your theme in Shopify, enable the Joy app embed on the duplicate, and use Shopify's Preview to test without affecting live customers.

## Enable on storefront

**Theme Editor → App Embeds → Joy Loyalty - Widget → Save**.

---

| Method | New customer accounts | Shopify Plus + Legacy | Setup |
|---|---|---|---|
| Sign in with Shop App | ✅ | ✅ | Toggle only |
| Email OTP | ❌ | ✅ | Paste Multipass key |
| Sign in with Google | ❌ | ✅ | Toggle only |
| Sign in with Facebook | ❌ | ✅ | Toggle only |

If your store uses **new customer accounts**, only Shop App login appears. Email OTP, Google, Facebook need Shopify Plus + legacy accounts and use Multipass.

## Setup

**Joy Admin → Settings → Additional Features → toggle Sign in with Shop App** (or other methods).

---

All in **Joy Admin → On-site content → Widget → Loyalty widget → Setup**.

## Referral popup

Customizable popups: **Referral Popup** (invite), **Referral Rewards Popup** (reward messaging), **Referral Success Popup**. Choose template or custom; configure content, position, frequency. If you skip the dedicated referral floating button, customers still access referral via the main widget.

## Visit website popup

Strategic on-arrival nudge. Configure two states: **Before Sign-In** and **After Sign-In**. Customize button icon, position (e.g., bottom-right).

## Reward reminder

Auto pop-ups when customer has unused/qualifying rewards.

| Reminder | Trigger |
|---|---|
| Birthday reward | Birthday approaching/today |
| Milestone achieved | Reached a new milestone |
| Unused discount | Has unredeemed coupon |
| Reward redemption | Has enough points |
| Visit website | Visits the store |

## Display modes

- **Show highest priority only** (default) — drag to reorder priority list
- **Show all sequentially** — one after another, each dismissed per session

## Related
- kb_referral (referral program setup)
- kb_loyalty-page (loyalty landing page)
- kb_account-page (account-page integration)
- kb_settings-color (color customization)
- kb_translations (translating widget strings)

# On-site Content Overview

## What is On-site content?

**Joy Admin → On-site content** is the central place to customize how Joy looks and behaves on the merchant's storefront. It controls all customer-facing UI: the floating widget, loyalty page, account page, product page badges, cart drawer, checkout, thank you page, and popups.

There is also a **Branding** section (top-level color scheme) that applies a consistent theme across all blocks at once.

---

## Sections

### Widget
**Joy Admin → On-site content → Widget** — has 3 cards:

| Card | Description | Path |
|---|---|---|
| **Loyalty widget** | The floating loyalty button/drawer shown on all storefront pages | On-site content → Widget → Loyalty widget → Setup |
| **Referrals** | Referral popup design — personalize look and feel | On-site content → Widget → Referrals → Setup |
| **Other** | Checkout discount block — show membership perks at checkout | On-site content → Widget → Other → Setup |

#### Unified widget vs Classic widget

| | Unified widget | Classic widget |
|---|---|---|
| Who has it | Merchants who installed after launch | Merchants who installed before launch |
| Badge | "Live" on Unified card | "Classic is live" |
| UI | Full sidebar editor + live preview | 4 horizontal tabs |
| Switch | Button "Switch to Unified" (top right of Widget tab) | — |

**Classic still handles:** Milestone program UI, interactive website popup, Wallet pass / QR, Submit receipt program, branded reminder popup.

→ See also: `kb_widget.md` (unified-vs-classic chunk) for full comparison and free setup offer script.

#### Widget v4 Design Editor — `Joy Admin → On-site content → Widget → Loyalty widget → Setup`

**Settings sidebar**
- **Design** — Preset Theme (Midnight, Forest, Ocean, Warm, Blush, Minimal, Dark, Slate) + Industry presets (Fashion, Beauty & Wellness, Food & Drink, Home & Garden, Sports & Fitness, Pets & Animals, Men's Grooming, Default), Primary/Background color, Layout (Widget / Drawer), Desktop position, Earn & Redeem layout (Tabs / Separate blocks), Text size, Border radius, Currency icon, Fonts, Text/Button/Card colors
- **Launcher** — Float button style (Icon only / Label only / Icon & label / Point balance), button size (S/M/L/XL), border radius (Pill/Rounded/Square), alignment (Bottom left/right)
- **Content & Translations** — inline editor for all widget text labels; **Revert to default** + **On-brand** (AI rewrite) buttons

**Header** — Program name text size, header background/text color, logo (upload / paste URL / use store logo), header background image (8:5, 800×500px, <200KB) + overlay opacity

**Body blocks** (toggle on/off, drag-to-reorder):

| Block | Notes |
|---|---|
| Membership card | Card layout (Compact/Classic), guest/member card images |
| My coupons | — |
| Refer a friend | — |
| Ways to earn | — |
| Ways to redeem | — |
| Recently viewed | Off by default |
| Recommended | Off by default |
| Recent activity | Off by default |
| Milestones | — |
| My QR code | — |
| Wallet pass | — |
| Subscription portal | Requires Joy Subscription extension |
| Wishlist | Off by default; requires Joy Wishlist app |

Membership card custom blocks: Heading, Rich text, Button, Divider, Image banner, Image with text, Custom link, Custom CTA.

**Footer menu** — bottom nav tabs (Home / Rewards / Orders / Wishlist / Reviews / Profile), drag to reorder, toggle visibility. Display mode (Icons & labels / Icons only / Labels only) + Active indicator style (Pill, etc.). The **Profile** tab has its own toggleable sub-pages: Account info, Referral link, Social accounts, Shipping addresses, Settings, Log out, Reviews.

**Extensions** — toggle: Wishlist, Bundling, Reviews, Subscription, Survey. App-dependent extensions show an Install / Setup guide / Verify panel plus layout options (e.g. Wishlist: Carousel / Grid / List).

**Advanced**
- **Display** — hide from guests, page restriction, instant popup, hide widget button
- **Popup** — popup behavior
- **Custom links** — redirect links for earning programs
- **Custom CSS** — pixel-level overrides

#### Display types
- **Floating widget** — small chatbox-style button (default)
- **Drawer** — large side panel (similar to cart drawer)
- Mobile: slides up from bottom for both

#### Live preview ("Preview as")
The editor's right pane is a live storefront preview ("Embed active" badge). Simulate viewers without touching the live store: **Device** (Desktop/Mobile), **Customer** (Signed in/Guest), **VIP tier** (Member no VIP / Simulate VIP active), Customise customer data, and "View on store".

#### Enable on storefront
**Theme Editor → App Embeds → Joy Loyalty - Widget → Save**

#### Referrals popup — `Joy Admin → On-site content → Widget → Referrals → Setup`
Customize referral popup design: Referral Invite / Referral Rewards / Referral Success. Choose template or custom; configure position, frequency.

→ See also: `kb_widget.md`

---

### Loyalty page
A dedicated storefront page showing the full loyalty program (earning, redeeming, VIP tiers, referral).

- Customize layout, sections shown, colors, and content blocks
- Path: **Joy Admin → On-site content → Loyalty page**

→ See also: `kb_loyalty-page.md`

---

### Account page
Joy embeds a loyalty summary block directly into the Shopify customer account page (points balance, tier, rewards).

- Supports both Legacy and New Customer Accounts
- Path: **Joy Admin → On-site content → Account page**

→ See also: `kb_account-page.md`

---

### Product page
Displays point earn estimate, reward badges, or tier-based perks directly on product pages.

- Shows customers how many points they'd earn for purchasing a product
- Path: **Joy Admin → On-site content → Product page**

→ See also: `kb_product-page.md`

---

### Cart drawer
Lets customers see and redeem their points/coupons directly inside the cart drawer without opening the full widget.

- Requires theme compatibility (Dawn and most modern themes supported)
- Path: **Joy Admin → On-site content → Cart drawer**

→ See also: `kb_cart-drawer.md`

---

### Checkout page
Shows loyalty info (points balance, available rewards) at checkout to encourage redemption before completing purchase.

- Requires Shopify checkout extensibility (available on most plans)
- Path: **Joy Admin → On-site content → Checkout page**

→ See also: `kb_checkout.md`

---

### Thank you page
Post-purchase touchpoint — shows points earned, tier progress, or referral invite after an order is placed.

- Path: **Joy Admin → On-site content → Thank you page**

→ See also: `kb_thank-you-page.md`

---

### Popups
On-site popups for engagement: referral invite, visit website nudge, reward reminders.

- Referral popup, Visit website popup, Reward reminder (birthday, milestone, unused discount, redemption)
- Path: **Joy Admin → On-site content → Branding → Popups**

→ See also: `kb_widget.md` (branding-popups-reminders chunk)

---

## Branding (color scheme)
Apply a one-click color theme across all on-site content blocks at once.

- Path: **Joy Admin → On-site content → Branding**
- Tabs: Widget, Loyalty page, Account page, Product page, Cart drawer, Checkout page, Thank you page, Popups
